strengths: 20+ years of full-stack experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js proficiency directly matching the primary stack
Active AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators and agentic workflows at current role
Strong testing culture: TDD practitioner, authored open-source test libraries, organized testing workshops
concerns: No Nest.js experience visible anywhere in the resume despite it being the primary backend framework
Kotlin/Java exposure is outdated and minimal — limited to robotic arm work at Altom (2016–2018)
Vitest and Playwright not mentioned; testing framework specifics don't align with stated stack requirements
response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned full-stack engineer whose TypeScript/Node.js depth and current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work align closely with the role's core requirements. His testing-first mindset, open-source contributions, and breadth across frontend and backend are clear differentiators. The main gap is Nest.js — a central framework in the primary stack — which is entirely absent from his resume; however, his deep Node.js expertise and demonstrated ability to adopt new tools suggest this is bridgeable quickly. Kotlin/Java exposure is too dated and thin to count as a real secondary-stack asset, and the specific testing frameworks listed in the JD (Vitest, Playwright) are not evidenced.
